testScenario: Verify that the courier whitelist correctly filters notification sources. Three sources are tested: a whitelisted courier, a non-whitelisted app, and a non-parcel sensitive app.

sources.label: Source A — Whitelisted courier app
sources.expectedBehavior: Pickup code extracted and stored as a new parcel record.

sources.label: Source B — Non-whitelisted app
sources.expectedBehavior: Notification ignored. No parcel record created. No content logged.

sources.label: Source C — Non-parcel sensitive app
sources.expectedBehavior: Notification ignored entirely. Sensitive content never parsed, stored, or logged.

_meta.description: Whitelist filtering verification across three notification sources (A: whitelisted courier, B: non-whitelisted app, C: non-parcel sensitive app).
_meta.redactionPolicy: All real notification titles, text, and pickup codes MUST be redacted. Store only SHA-256 hashes of extracted codes, never plaintext.
